name: Hearing things
description: $Hearing Things ($HEARING) is a Solana based meme coin that perfectly embodies one of the top 5 most repeated phrases on Crypto Twitter: "hearing things." In the fast paced world of crypto trading, "hearing things" has become shorthand for catching wind of rumors, insider hints, upcoming listings, partnerships, or pumps before they hit the charts. Degens constantly post "hearing things..." followed by cryptic emojis (👂) or teasers about potential moonshots, turning it into a cultural staple across timelines. From influencers dropping subtle alpha to communities raiding replies, the phrase signals early positioning in a market driven by whispers and FOMO.
